original: Nope. You need to take off your hard light suit before doing this.
Nope. You’re still waiting for the effects of the last one to kick in. You’re not going to risk turning into a puddle.
It’s amazing what they can fit into pills these days, though this particular pill is more of a potion-packing gelcap. The thing is big enough to make you wonder if you’ll be able to swallow it at all
, but then your spaced-out mind daydreams about taking far bigger... veinier packages into your throat. This’ll be no trouble at all
. Oh well, if you want to
gain the advantages of a galotian

It... it wasn’t that bad. It didn’t feel nearly as big as it looked. You barely even felt it! Nothing to do now but wait for that lump in your belly to dissolve and work its magic. Just how long is this stuff supposed to take anyway?
Articles on the Codex peg it somewhere between thirty minutes and an hour. Time to wait.

Another day, another gelcap full of transformative possibilities. You roll the pill around in your palm as you wonder what it’ll do to you, then knock it back before doubts can overcome your courage. All that’s left is to wait a little while for the gelcap to dissolve and release the pre-packed mutagenic agents into your system.
e.capitalA+e.short+" eats the pill to no effect.
